chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Crl. Bail Application No.3592 of 2025 ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ 1. For order on MA No.19045/2025 (Urgent). 2. For order on MA No.19046/2025 (Exemption). 3. For hearing of case. 29.12.2025 Mr. Ghulam Nabi Shar, Advocate for Applicant a/w applicant. -------------------- 1. Urgency granted. 2. Exemption granted subject to all just exceptions. 3. Through this Criminal Bail Application the applicant, namely, Muhammad Suleman Abbasi s/o Gul Zaman seeks protective bail in Crime No.1439/2025 for the offence under section 302/34, PPC registered at Police Station Shehzad Town, Islamabad. Counsel for the applicant submits that the applicant has been falsely implicated in this case; that the name of the applicant is not mentioned in the FIR and the warrant of arrest has been issued in the subject Crime No.1439/2025; that applicant apprehends his arrest by the hands of the police, which humiliate him, therefore, he may be granted protective bail enabling him to approach and surrender before the trial Court i.e. Civil Judge-cum-Judicial Magistrate, East Islamabad. Without touching the merits of the case, the applicant above- named is admitted protective bail in the sum of Rs.50,000/- (Rupees Fifty Thousand) with P.R. bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the Nazir of this Court enabling him to approach and surrender before the trial Court for a period of fifteen days.

Civil Judge-cum-Judicial Magistrate, East Islamabad. Without touching the merits of the case, the applicant above- named is admitted protective bail in the sum of Rs.50,000/- (Rupees Fifty Thousand) with P.R. bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the Nazir of this Court enabling him to approach and surrender before the trial Court for a period of fifteen days. In case the applicant does not surrender before the trial Court within the above stipulated period, the surety furnished before this Court shall stand forfeited. Instant Crl. Bail application stands disposed of accordingly. JUDGE Farhan/PS
